identity_note: Premium Geckoboard-style dashboard. High data density, massive typography for KPIs, obsidian backgrounds with neon accent charts. Avoids default AI slop. Serious, investor-ready aesthetic.

primary_font.name: Cabinet Grotesk
primary_font.usage: Headlines, KPI numbers, Empty state hero text, Main navigation items.

secondary_font.name: IBM Plex Sans
secondary_font.usage: Body, table data, axis labels, small buttons, UI text.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Ultra-dense but legible. Left sidebar + massive right scrollable view.

cards.style: bg-[#0E1420] border border-[#1A2333] rounded-xl shadow-none. Must feel like milled tactile panels, not floating cards.

buttons.primary_cta: bg-[#2DD4BF]/10 border border-[#2DD4BF] text-[#2DD4BF] hover:bg-[#2DD4BF] hover:text-[#04070D] font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(45,212,191,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#090E17] border border-[#1A2333] hover:border-[#F8FAFC]/50 text-[#F8FAFC] px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all text-sm
buttons.export_buttons: Flex row, small outline buttons in the header. Use lucide-react icons for Download (PNG) and Code (HTML).

file_upload_zone.style: Dashed 2px border border-[#1A2333] rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:border-[#2DD4BF] hover:bg-[#2DD4BF]/5 transition-all bg-[#04070D]/50 relative group

kpi_widget.typography: text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] tracking-tighter text-white
kpi_widget.label: text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#94A3B8] font-['IBM_Plex_Sans'] mb-2 block

charts.theme_rules: MUST use 'plotly_dark' template. Overwrite Plotly's default background colors: paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)', plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)'. Grid lines must be 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'. Chart traces must use the exact hex colors from colors.accents.

empty_state.layout: Asymmetric bento grid layout. Left-aligned huge display text (Cabinet Grotesk). Large image on the right acting as visual anchor.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for E2E testing. e.g., data-testid='upload-zone', data-testid='generate-btn', data-testid='export-html-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Cabinet Grotesk (Primary/Headlines) and IBM Plex Sans (Body/UI) via web fonts in index.css.
Implement a Split-View Layout: Fixed Left Sidebar for upload/controls, Scrollable Right View for the dashboard.
Sidebar should contain: Brand Logo, Theme Toggle, Drag-Drop File Upload Zone, File Metadata display, 'Generate Dashboard' primary CTA, 'Regenerate' secondary CTA.
Main View Header should contain: Dynamic AI Title + Subtitle, and prominent Export buttons (HTML & PNG) on the right edge.
KPI Widgets: Use the 'kpi_widget' component style. The numbers must be massive (text-5xl or 6xl) to mimic the Geckoboard aesthetic. Add Framer Motion count-up effect if possible.

Charts: Strictly use react-plotly.js. Ensure the charts map to the dark, borderless card styles perfectly. Remove default Plotly white backgrounds entirely by setting 'paper_bgcolor' and 'plot_bgcolor' to transparent.
Layout Grid: Use the 'Control Room' grid strategy. Use col-span utilities (e.g., col-span-2) to make the primary hero chart span larger than secondary charts.
Interactivity: When a file is uploaded, show a sleek loading state (using ASCII loader or elegant Framer Motion spinner) before rendering the final Plotly dashboard.
Avoid the center-everything disease. Left-align text inputs and KPI text.
Do NOT use generic purple/mint tech gradients. Stick strictly to the dark obsidian void background with sharp neon graph traces.
